violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. Per interview, new menus are to be printed soon and will have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Certification expired in January. Owner/operator is taking an approved food safety management class and will recertify with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Deli meats and prepared foods observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in were observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2-door reach-in condenser fans as well as the outer surfaces and gaskets of equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026
The hot water at the handsink is not currently working as it is leaking. Service call has been placed. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026

The flooring throughout the kitchen, under the 3-bay sink, and at a section of the counter is in poor repair. Tiles are missing leaving exposed wood. Per interview of owner/operator, the floor is in the process of being repaired a section at a time. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Deli meats and prepared foods observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in were observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. The facility is also lacking test strips for the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The flooring throughout the kitchen, under the 3-bay sink, and at a section of the counter is in poor repair. Tiles are missing leaving exposed wood. Per interview of owner/operator, the floor is in the process of being repaired a section at a time. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Flooring must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The floor throughout the kitchen and in a section of the counter area is in poor repair. Tiles are missing leaving exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Progress has been made. Flooring is to be repaired using proper materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
